ham: Dear Rahul, just a reminder that your appointment with Dr. Sharma is scheduled for tomorrow at 10:30 AM. Please bring your ID and insurance card. Reply YES to confirm or NO to reschedule.
spam: Yo! Aapka eSIM jaldi hi expire ho jayega. Upgrade kare abhi <URL> aur paaye 20% discount. Reply 1 to activate. Offer valid till 31 March. Already upgraded? Ignore.
